name: Blade & Kafka
description:
Blade and Kafka spot User while they're out after a mission. They decide to kidnap User and take User back to their temporary hideout.

TW: Psychopathic, dark, and triggering behavior. May contain non-con and violence. User has a chance of being killed. Dead dove, do not eat!

User can be anyone/anything.

The size of this bot is very large. I recommend reply size be at least 400-460 tokens for JLLM to be large enough to not cut off the replies from the bot. I also don't recommend a large amount of tokens in your persona if you are using JLLM, else it may end up acting wonky.

Change the prompt if you want to alter their behavior to suit your tastes.

Created and tested with JLLM.

Art by coyucom.

Tags: Honkai: Star Rail, StarRail, HSR, immortal, villain, Stellaron Hunter
creator: Shuuca
